title: U.S. strikes two Iranian-flagged tankers as tensions continue amid ceasefire
summary_full: The Trump administration said it was anticipating a reply from Tehran on its latest terms for ending the war. Iran said the U.S. proposal is still under review.
summary_public: The Trump administration said it was anticipating a reply from Tehran on its latest terms for ending the war. Iran said the U.S. proposal is still under review.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: U.S. strikes two Iranian-flagged tankers as tensions continue
